description: Fix false-positive authentication detection where isAuthenticated returns true based on olk-isauthed localStorage flag even when no usable MSAL token exists.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/outlook && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Remove olk-isauthed fallback from isAuthenticated
userStories.description: isAuthenticated falls back to checking olk-isauthed=1 in localStorage when getAuth() returns null, causing false-positive readiness when no token is available.
acceptanceCriteria: isAuthenticated only returns true when getAuth() returns a non-null value with a usable token
The olk-isauthed localStorage check is removed or only used as a secondary signal alongside getAuth()
